# Travel to Transform

> Travel to Transform is the platform of Freeman Fung — speaker, coach and author — helping people turn travel into deep personal transformation and purposeful living. The core idea: travel is not just a getaway, it is a gateway to extraordinary living and to becoming a conscious global citizen. Offerings include the book "Travel to Transform: Awaken the Global Citizen in You and Thrive in the Modern World," the Travel Mastery Blueprint (TMB) course, 1:1 transformational coaching, keynote speaking, a free masterclass, and the Traveller DNA Quiz.

## About
- [About Freeman Fung](https://traveltotransform.com/about): Who Freeman is — speaker, coach, author and founder of Travel to Transform.
- [My Travel Stories](https://traveltotransform.com/my-travel-stories): Personal stories of the journeys that shaped Freeman's path from tourist to transformed global citizen.
- [Appreciation](https://traveltotransform.com/appreciation): Gratitude to the Travel to Transform community.

## Offers
- [The Book](https://traveltotransform.com/the-book): "Travel to Transform: Awaken the Global Citizen in You and Thrive in the Modern World."
- [The Travel Mastery Blueprint (TMB) course](https://traveltotransform.com/course/tmb): Flagship interactive course to travel the world purposefully and transform your life.
- [Coaching](https://traveltotransform.com/coaching): 1:1 transformational coaching with Freeman Fung.
- [Speaking](https://traveltotransform.com/speaking): Book Freeman for keynotes on transformational travel, global citizenship and conscious living.
- [The Traveller DNA Quiz](https://traveltotransform.com/the-traveller-dna-quiz): Free quiz to discover your travel archetype and how to turn your next journey into transformation.

## Content
- [Podcast appearances](https://traveltotransform.com/podcast): Freeman on transformational travel, global citizenship and conscious living.
- [Blog](https://traveltotransform.com/blog): Articles on purposeful travel, mindfulness, global citizenship and personal growth.
- [Book Reviews](https://traveltotransform.com/book-reviews): Reader reviews of the Travel to Transform book.
- [Resources](https://traveltotransform.com/resources): Free tools and guides for travelling with purpose.

## Contact
- [Contact](https://traveltotransform.com/contact): General enquiries.
- [Media Kit](https://traveltotransform.com/media-kit): Bio, photos and speaking topics for media and event partners.
- [Sitemap](https://traveltotransform.com/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable pages.
